name: Pizza (Using Biscuit Mix)
recipeIngredient: 1/2 medium Green pepper; cut in very thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Lightly grease a baking sheet or pizza pan.
3. Stir biscuit mix and water together until mix is barely moistened. Knead on a lightly floured surface for 15 turns.
4. Pat or roll dough into an 8-inch circle on the baking sheet or pizza pan. Turn up the edge of the dough slightly to form a rim.
5. Bake until the surface begins to dry, about 6 minutes.
6. Brown beef in a hot frying pan and drain.
7. Stir oregano and garlic powder into puree. Spread over the crust. Sprinkle with browned beef, onion, green pepper, and top with cheese.
8. Bake until the cheese is melted and the crust is golden brown, about 15 minutes.
9. Cut into 4 wedges.
